Architectural Split-Level Elegance!

15 BROTHERS STREET, GOOGONG

Commanding in presence and refined in execution, this striking split-level home delivers an exceptional standard of contemporary family living, thoughtfully designed with both luxury and functionality in mind. From its bold façade to its carefully curated interiors, every detail has been considered to create a home of distinction and comfort. The intelligent split-level design offers natural separation between living zones, beginning with a beautifully appointed master retreat positioned privately away from the secondary bedrooms. Generous in scale, it features a sophisticated ensuite complete with twin floating vanities, statement black accents and premium finishes, creating a luxurious sanctuary. At the heart of the home, the open-plan living and dining area is highlighted by the impressive media wall, complete with a 60 inch electric fireplace. The designer kitchen is a true centrepiece, enhanced by a feature panel pendant light above the waterfall edge island bench. Equipped with premium BOSCH appliances and a spacious walk-in pantry, it offers both style and practicality. The walk-in pantry and laundry are cleverly tucked behind the kitchen, concealed by matching cabinetry to maintain clean lines and a cohesive aesthetic. Three additional, generously sized secondary bedrooms, each fitted with mirrored built-in robes, are serviced by a stunning main bathroom showcasing a freestanding bath, floating vanity and bold black accents, complemented by a separate powder room for added convenience. Designed for growing families, the home also boasts a third living area or rumpus room, offering flexibility as a children's retreat or additional lounge space. A dedicated study with custom cabinetry provides the perfect work-from-home environment. Outdoors, a covered and tiled alfresco extends the living experience, ideal for year-round entertaining and relaxed gatherings, overlooking the landscaped yards. Features: Turn key, brand new Formal living room Open plan living, dining and kitchen with electric fireplace Children's retreat area Modern kitchen with large island bench 900mm BOSCH gas stove 600mm BOSCH oven BOSCH dishwasher Walk in pantry, concealed by cabintry Master bedroom with walk in robe Ensuite with double floating vanity Three additional bedrooms with mirrored built in robes Main bathroom with freestanding bath Separate powder room Laundry with external access Double garage with internal access Covered, tiled alfresco Turfed backyard Landscaped front gardens Ducted reverse cycle heating and cooling Double glazed windows This is a home that balances architectural presence with thoughtful design, delivering premium finishes, multiple living zones and timeless style in a home that truly stands apart. Contact us today to arrange a viewing.
